calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Off Calendar

Request For Entry Of Court Default Judgment And "Prove Up" Hearing And Attached Declarations Of Debbie Postlethwaite And Jacob Harker
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jacob Harker, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DEBBIE POSTLETHWAITE.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) GEORGE ANDERSON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff Debbie Postlethwaite sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $252,195.86
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $165,971.74
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $1040.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $419,207.60
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Continued To Jan-29-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
